criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Number and sophistication of AI-powered features such as filters, editing tools, and enhancements.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert reviews

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features and bug fixes.

criteria.name: Compatibility
criteria.description: Number of platforms and devices the app is compatible with.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, official app websites

criteria.name: Social Media Integration
criteria.description: Ability to share edited photos and videos directly to social media platforms.

criteria.name: In-App Purchases
criteria.description: Availability and cost of in-app purchases for additional features.

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support.

criteria.name: Community and Tutorials
criteria.description: Availability of community forums and tutorials for users.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, user reviews, tech blogs
